subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy recent letter was received, and great joy was obtained from thy conversations with those two honored persons [3.5s]... ...The future of Iran is of the utmost greatness, majesty, and glory, for it is the native land of the Blessed Beauty
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه اخیر وصول یافت و از گفتگوی با شخصین محترمین بشاشت حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @predictions and prophecies, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @consolation and comfort
